attempts.blocker: Lease-bound semantic context reported the Settings page while the owned screenshot showed the earlier Catalog page.
The owned Hermes lease disappeared before the initial read and again after the recovered dashboard inspection.

visible_browser.note: The campaign stopped after the one allowed recovery repeated the same lease-ownership class of failure. Prior Seller customer passes were on an invalidated source hash and are not counted.

browser_owner_diagnosis.earliest_divergence: A successful session_preflight returned an owned window and tab; the next run reported no active lease, sessions was empty, and reaped was empty.
browser_owner_diagnosis.real_url_probe_after_3_seconds: pass; inventory present, page_context and screenshot succeeded, closeout clean
browser_owner_diagnosis.real_url_probe_after_35_seconds: pass; inventory present, page_context succeeded, closeout clean
browser_owner_diagnosis.isolation_suite_lease_lifecycle: pass through preflight, inventory, concurrent operations and closeout; suite overall failed later on an unrelated debug-evaluate side-effect guard
browser_owner_diagnosis.remaining_unknown: The bridge does not retain a tombstone identifying what removed the reviewer-owned window or lease.

warnings: Gateway emitted dependency deprecation warnings only.
Buyer build emitted the existing greater-than-500-kB chunk-size advisory.
